expertAssessments.rationale: The run reproduced the production Reporter fallback mismatch, added regression coverage, deployed the fix, and rechecked the same Reporter UI/API path on Vercel production.
Monitoring warning/critical grounding evidence now affects report severity, affected servers, timeline, and read-only diagnostic actions instead of being hidden behind a normal summary.
The fix keeps recommendations read-only and preserves the normal authenticated production UI path; no direct API bypass was used for the final acceptance check.
GitLab main validate, release deployment, Cloud Run AI Engine deploy, smoke jobs, Vercel deployment readiness, version endpoint, and usage check all passed.
Targeted Vitest coverage protects the no-metric-anomaly but warning/critical grounding-evidence path, and Playwright MCP captured durable before/after production evidence.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period effective $11.4422, billed $0.0000; no unexpected billed usage observed after Reporter fallback evidence QA.

artifacts.label: Reporter fallback evidence fix QA notes

completedImprovements.title: Reporter fallback reflects monitoring warning/critical evidence instead of normalizing it away
